title: Fiery Syrian Lamb Wrap
description: A peppery and juicy Syrian dish featuring cayenne pepper and ferment-kimchi, wrapped in a ti-leaf wrap, perfect for a dash-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb shoulder with cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, then transfer to the oven.
Roast the lamb in the oven for 20 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the lamb is cooking, prepare the ferment-kimchi by chopping it into small pieces.
Warm the ti leaves by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by slicing the cooked lamb and placing it onto a ti leaf, then topping with ferment-kimchi and garlic.
